## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (`composer format`)
- [ ] I have run static analysis (`composer analyse`) with no new errors
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`composer test`)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README if needed
- [ ] This PR targets the `main` branch (or the correct feature branch)
